comments.text: My recent paper has a partial result on $D_3$, namely that $$(c+o(1)) n^{1/2} \leq |D_3 \cap \{1,\dots,n\}| \leq n^{1/2+o(1)}$$ where $$ c = \sum_{a \geq 2: a \neq n^2 \forall n} \frac{1}{s(a!)^{1/2}} = 2.709751\dots$$ (cf. OEIS A389117), where $s(a!)$ is the squarefree component of $a!$. The lower bound should be the truth; this is conjectured in p. 346 of [ErGr76], who said "they are sure now [that it is true], but we cannot prove it. (They did not compute $c$ explicitly, but this is straightforward.)
